message:
refactor(test): switch session persistence test from tokio to asupersync runtime

Replace #[tokio::test] with manually constructed asupersync runtime using
RuntimeBuilder::current_thread() and block_on(). Aligns the test
infrastructure with the project's own async runtime instead of depending
on tokio's test harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
